title: Why the United Arab Emirates is a target for Iran's aggression
summary_full: Iran is looking to test a state that has positioned itself as the Gulf's safest bridge between East and West — and the future of the region.
summary_public: Iran is looking to test a state that has positioned itself as the Gulf's safest bridge between East and West — and the future of the region.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Why the United Arab Emirates is a target for Iran's aggression
